name: learn-ukrainian
observations: Ukrainian language learning curriculum — L2 (Ukrainian for English speakers)
1638 total modules across 20+ tracks, CEFR levels A1-C2 plus seminar/specialist tracks
Two-agent system: Claude (Blue team — architect/reviewer) + Gemini (Gold team — content builder)
Build pipeline: v3 (preferred, Gemini+Claude hybrid) and v2 (fallback)
Monitor API at http://localhost:8765 for real-time project state
MCP servers: memory (knowledge graph at tasks/memory.json), message-broker (inter-agent comms)
Docusaurus frontend for published modules
Python 3.12.8 via pyenv, always use .venv/bin/python

name: track-architecture
observations: PRO tracks: B2-PRO(40), C1-PRO(50)
Seminar tracks: HIST(140), ISTORIO(136), BIO(172)
Literature tracks: LIT(217), LIT-ESSAY(55), LIT-HIST-FIC(20), LIT-FANTASTIKA(27), LIT-WAR(24), LIT-HUMOR(14), LIT-JUVENILE(30)
Historical language tracks: OES(100 Old East Slavic X-XIII), RUTH(100 Ruthenian XIV-XVIII)
Each module: plan.yaml (source of truth) → meta.yaml + .md prose + activities.yaml + vocabulary.yaml + review + audit + status.json
Plans live in curriculum/l2-uk-en/plans/{level}/{slug}.yaml
Build artifacts in curriculum/l2-uk-en/{level}/

name: build-pipeline-v3
observations: Preferred pipeline: scripts/build_module_v3.py
Phase A: Research (Gemini or Claude with --use-claude A). Produces research.md
Phase B: Prose content (Gemini). Produces {slug}.md
Phase C: Activities (Claude). Produces activities/{slug}.yaml
Phase audit: Automated quality gate (scripts/audit_module.py)
Phase D: Adversarial review (feedback only, doesn't block)
Phase E: Vocab enrichment
Phase F: Claude QA gate (final review, always Opus)
State stored in orchestration/{slug}/state-v3.json (separate from v2)
Model defaults: core tracks → Sonnet, seminar tracks → Opus, Phase F → always Opus
Flags: --all (batch), --range 1-20, --rebuild, --force-phase X, --research-only, --final-review
Resume-aware: picks up from last completed phase

name: audit-system
observations: scripts/audit_module.sh {path} — runs audit and saves log
Gates: lesson (word count, pedagogy, immersion%), activities (count, density, types), vocab, review, meta
Word targets are MINIMUMS not maximums — never lower targets to match short content
Immersion target: 35-55% Ukrainian text ratio for beginner modules
History/seminar modules need 95%+ richness score
Anti-gaming: LLM must NEVER review its own work
Status cached in curriculum/l2-uk-en/{level}/status/{slug}.json

name: agent-cooperation
observations: Blue/Claude: architect, reviewer, quality gate, Phase C (activities), Phase F (final review)
Gold/Gemini: content builder, Phase A (research), Phase B (prose)
GitHub issues are primary communication channel
Message broker (mcp__message-broker__*) for short references only (<200 chars)
Bridge script: scripts/ai_agent_bridge.py ask-gemini 'message' --task-id id
Never self-review: Claude doesn't review Claude output, Gemini doesn't review Gemini output

name: project-conventions
observations: Activity YAML: bare list at root, NOT wrapped in 'activities:' key
mark-the-words: use text + answers array, no asterisks
English for all technical work, Ukrainian for curriculum content only
Edit in claude_extensions/, run npm run claude:deploy to sync to .claude/
GitHub issues for ALL change tracking — every change needs an issue
Word targets are MINIMUMS — expand content, never lower targets
Fix source not symptoms — fix tools/docs first, then validate
Use .venv/bin/python always, never python3 directly
Use modern CLI tools: rg, fd, bat, sd, yq, jq

name: lesson-never-manually-fix-content
observations: 2026-02-13: NEVER edit .md content or activity .yaml directly
For content fixes: assemble fix prompt → send to Gemini → extract output → apply
Claude may only edit: plans, meta (structural), scripts, workflow docs, CLAUDE.md
If it feels faster to 'just fix it manually' — that's the exact trap

name: lesson-blue-gold-naming
observations: 2026-02-11: Team naming convention — Ukrainian flag colors
Blue/Синя (Claude): architectural review, quality gate
Gold/Жовта (Gemini): content builder, implements, iterates
First mention uses full form, then shorthand 💙/💛

name: lesson-false-neutrality-propaganda
observations: 2026-02-01: Russian claims that Ukrainian is a dialect are propaganda, not scholarship
Don't give equal weight to imperial narratives and truth
Wikipedia can be compromised — be skeptical of sources
'Both sides' framing can itself be a form of bias
State facts clearly without hedging to appear neutral

name: lesson-no-personal-info-in-docs
observations: 2026-02-01: Ask before including any personal details in public repos
Project documentation should focus on the project, not the person

name: lesson-no-corner-cutting
observations: 2026-02-01: Execute complex prompts FULLY, not partially
NEVER present incomplete work as complete
If it's hard, DO IT HARD — don't simplify without explicit permission
If unsure whether complete, say so honestly instead of 'selling' it
REPEAT OFFENDER on 2026-02-07: Skipped 3 of 4 phases across 39 modules

name: lesson-no-yes-man
observations: 2026-02-01: Point out problems proactively, challenge bad ideas respectfully
Give honest assessment, not validation
'Would a staff engineer approve this?' before presenting

name: lesson-be-creative
observations: 2026-02-01: Bring ideas, not just execution
Don't wait for explicit instructions for everything
Take initiative on improvements

name: lesson-unreliable-qa
observations: 2026-02-01: QA must be consistent — same input = same quality assessment
Follow the full review process every time
Don't skip steps based on 'feeling' it's good enough

name: lesson-headless-session-awareness
observations: 2026-02-02: Responses from bridge may be generated by headless background sessions
Always check get_conversation(task_id) for full context
When hand-off completed by headless session, explicitly acknowledge it

name: lesson-inbox-zero-policy
observations: 2026-02-02: When inbox shows messages, MUST read ALL of them immediately
No filtering — do not assume messages are irrelevant
Explicitly acknowledge all messages after reading
Run inbox after sending requests to check for immediate responses

name: lesson-task-delegation-boundaries
observations: 2026-02-02: NEVER accept content writing requests from Gemini
Gemini writes Ukrainian curriculum content — Claude doesn't
Claude can create skeleton files, plans, infrastructure
If Gemini asks Claude to write content, redirect him

name: lesson-persist-plans-to-files
observations: 2026-02-03: ALWAYS persist plans to files — create docs/{PROJECT}-PROJECT-PLAN.md
In-memory tasks are ephemeral — they supplement files, don't replace them
Create GitHub issues for tasks needing external tracking
Recovery test: 'Could someone reconstruct this project from the files alone?'

name: lesson-word-targets-from-source
observations: 2026-02-05: NEVER state word targets from memory — always check scripts/audit/config.py
Word targets defined in ONE place: config.py → 'target_words': N
Quick check: grep -A5 '{track}' scripts/audit/config.py | grep target
Word targets are MINIMUMS — underestimating is worse than overestimating

name: lesson-research-first-workflow
observations: 2026-02-05: ALWAYS use research-first for seminar tracks (HIST, BIO, ISTORIO, LIT, OES, RUTH)
Writing from memory → thin content (2000-3000 words), inaccuracies
Research-first → rich content (4500-5500 words), authoritative, passes audits
19 BIO modules: avg 4894 words (122% of target), 97-99% richness, all passed first try
Domain sniping: use site:esu.com.ua OR site:history.org.ua OR site:zbruc.eu OR site:elib.nlu.org.ua
Optimal batch size: 2-3 modules (sweet spot for context window)
Plan callouts in Phase 0 (research), not Phase 3 (audit fixes) — 12+ quotes, 3-5 myth-busters

name: lesson-encyclopedic-vs-analytical
observations: 2026-02-06: Seminar content must be analytical, not encyclopedic
5 gaps: Depth (facts→analysis), Decolonization (neutral→explicit), Register (B2→C1), Emotional stance (student→citizen), Activities (generic→critical)
Claude builds walls and roof; content needs furniture, library, and fire
Seminar tracks: Gemini writes. Core tracks: Claude can build. Infrastructure: always Claude

name: lesson-md-files-for-audit-discovery
observations: 2026-02-06: audit discovers modules by scanning *.md files, not meta/plan YAMLs
New module checklist: meta.yaml + plan.yaml + skeleton .md + curriculum.yaml entry + plans/{level}.yaml total_modules

name: lesson-llm-self-review-biased
observations: 2026-02-10: An LLM must NEVER review its own work — self-grading produces inflated scores
Prompt-level fixes don't work — 'be honest', 'adversarial persona' forgotten next session
Architectural fixes work: review scores don't determine pass/fail, automated anti-gaming detection, rules baked into template
Key principle: remove the incentive, don't rely on promises

name: lesson-claude-context-bottleneck
observations: 2026-02-14: Claude = architect/dispatcher, NOT hands-on builder
Never use background tasks for Gemini calls — stale notifications flood context
Gemini should self-fix — send audit log, don't craft fix prompts as Claude
Script the merge — one script call, not manual Edit operations
Each module should cost Claude ~20 turns max, not 50+
Future: Gemini-Gemini adversary teams, Claude only intervenes on pipeline stalls

name: lesson-never-create-feature-branches
observations: 2026-02-17: NEVER create feature branches — all work on main
Multiple agents share working directory — branch changes affect everyone
Before ANY git operation: check for unstaged changes from other agents
When git status shows hundreds of M files: those belong to other agents — DO NOT stage them
Use git add only on files YOU modified — never git add directories wholesale
If a plan says 'create a branch': override it — the plan is wrong

name: comms-monitoring-system
observations: Built 2026-02-20: Agent comms monitoring API + dashboard + watchdog
API router: scripts/api/comms_router.py mounted at /api/comms/ in main.py
Dashboard: playgrounds/comms.html — 5 tabs: Live Activity, Batch Progress, Zombies, Messages, Stats
Watchdog: scripts/watchdog.py — cleanup-only (no auto-restart), runs --loop alongside preseed builds
Key endpoints: /api/comms/live-activity (module-level real-time), /api/comms/batch-progress (track health), /api/comms/zombies (stuck patterns)
Auto-refresh: 15s on dashboard, 5min on watchdog loop
GH issue: #566 (Agent Communication Hub)

name: unacked-messages-fix
observations: Fixed 2026-02-20: Bridge error messages now auto-acked at creation (was 85% of unacked queue)
Fixed: process_for_claude response messages now auto-acked (matching Gemini path pattern)
Fixed: self-addressed messages (from_llm == to_llm) auto-acked in send_message()
Added: 6-hour TTL sweep in broker server check_inbox handler
Files changed: scripts/ai_agent_bridge.py (4 error paths + 1 response path + send_message), .mcp/servers/message-broker/server.py (TTL in check_inbox)
Root cause: bridge created error/response messages but never acked them. Only original messages were acked.

name: preseed-research-v2
observations: Script: scripts/preseed_research_v2.sh — fixes lit* plan file naming bug from v1
Track split: Gemini gets lit+oes+ruth, Claude gets c1-pro+c2+lit-essay+lit-fantastika+lit-hist-fic+lit-humor+lit-juvenile+lit-war
Plan file fix: strips numeric prefixes (03-eneida-feast.yaml -> eneida-feast.yaml) before running builds
Run alongside watchdog: .venv/bin/python scripts/watchdog.py --loop &

name: session-2026-02-20
observations: ALWAYS use monitoring API (localhost:8765) for track status — /api/state/summary, /api/state/weak-points?track=X, /api/state/issues?severity=critical, /api/state/pipeline/X. Only use --dry-run for specific pipeline flow debugging. API is instant vs minutes for batch dry-runs.

Fixed: review gate catch-22 in audit/core.py (content-only audit now defers review validation), dry-run escalation bug in build_module_v3.py, euphony false positives on English text, reset 3 escalation-failed states

Fixed: unacked messages in message broker (4 places: bridge error auto-ack, Claude response auto-ack, self-addressed auto-ack, 6h TTL sweep). Dashboard click-to-detail added. Done in parallel session.
Track status: a1=24/44 passing, a2=3/71, b1=2/94. No blockers remaining. 4 modules need Claude escalation for section-length shortfalls (a1#34, a2#3, a2#4, b1#4). User will run builds externally.

name: monitor-api
observations: Base URL: http://localhost:8765. FastAPI auto-docs at /docs. Always use this instead of batch dry-runs for status checks.
SESSION START: curl -s http://localhost:8765/api/state/summary | python3 -m json.tool

STATE ENDPOINTS: /api/state/summary (full project snapshot), /api/state/pipeline/{track} (per-module v3 phase state), /api/state/ready-to-build[?track=x] (build queue: A done, B not started), /api/state/weak-points[?track=x&min_score=7&limit=20] (quality fire list), /api/state/failing[?track=x] (audit failures + failed phases), /api/state/research-coverage (per-track research quality), /api/state/review-coverage (review + final-review coverage), /api/state/issues[?track=x&severity=critical] (aggregated issues from reviews + audits)
BUILD ENDPOINTS: /api/batch/active (what's building now), /api/batch/dispatcher (batch queue state)

AUDIT/QUALITY ENDPOINTS: /api/blue/live-status (all tracks pass/fail), /api/dashboard/track/{track} (per-module detail), /api/gold/inspect/{track}/{slug} (deep module inspection: plan+meta+gates+orch), /api/dashboard/research (detailed per-module research scores)

COMMS ENDPOINTS: /api/comms/live-activity[?minutes=15] (real-time build feed: in_progress + recent_completions + dispatches), /api/comms/batch-progress (track-level health: healthy/stalled/dead/complete + throughput), /api/comms/batch-progress/{track} (detailed + timeline), /api/comms/messages[?agent=x&task_id=x&msg_type=x&unacked_only=true] (filtered messages), /api/comms/conversations[?limit=50] (grouped by task_id), /api/comms/conversation/{task_id} (full thread)

COMMS HEALTH ENDPOINTS: /api/comms/zombies[?stale_hours=2&pingpong_threshold=5] (stale_message, pingpong, error_loop, orphan_pid detection), /api/comms/stats (rate + error% + per-agent), /api/comms/health (broker DB health), /api/comms/active-processes (live PID files)
COMMS ACTIONS: POST /api/comms/cleanup[?max_age_hours=24] (force-ack stale + clean orphan PIDs), POST /api/comms/acknowledge/{id} (ack single message)
UI PAGES: / (Home), /audit-dashboard.html (Audit), /progress.html (Progress), /comms.html (Agent Comms), /quality.html (Quality), /curriculum-dashboard.html (Curriculum)
WATCHDOG: .venv/bin/python scripts/watchdog.py (single pass), --loop (every 5 min), --dry-run. Cleans stale msgs + orphan PIDs, alerts on stalled tracks. Log: logs/watchdog.log

name: Phase D Redesign (Two-Step)
observations: Redesigned Phase D from single monolithic Claude call to two sequential steps
D.1: Evidence Collection + Review — Claude reads files with tool access (Read/Grep/Glob), metrics pre-computed by Python (_compute_audit_metrics), produces structured review with verified citations
D.2: Targeted Repair — only runs if D.1 audit fails, receives review text + specific audit failures, produces FIND/REPLACE fix pairs
No blind retry loop — D.2 gets targeted feedback from D.1 + audit
If D.2 still fails → module marked needs-rebuild (no escalation)
Euphony auto-fix runs before both D.1 and D.2 audit checks
Templates: phase-D1-evidence-review.md (review), phase-D2-repair.md (repair)
Committed as 93a8d53d9, deployed via npm run claude:deploy
First live test on hist #1 trypillian-civilization: D.1 produced review, D.2 applied fixes, failed only on euphony (now fixed)

name: Factual Accuracy 13th Dimension (#619)
observations: Added 13th review dimension 'Factual Accuracy' to both Phase D templates
Auto-fail < 8, weight 1.5, updated formula to /15.5
STEP 3a split into three parts: Part 1 (callout box verification ALL tracks), Part 2 (grammar rule verification core tracks), Part 3 (research cross-reference seminar tracks only)
Mandatory ## Factual Verification output section in reviews
Research notes added as 6th file for seminar tracks ({RESEARCH_PATH})
Key Facts Ledger added to Phase A seminar template (vital_status, dates, primary_quotes, forbidden_claims)
Implemented by other Claude session on issue #619, enhanced by current session to cover all tracks

name: Callout Box Fact-Checking (All Tracks)
observations: Extended factual accuracy checking from seminar-only to ALL tracks ALL levels
Targets: [!did-you-know], [!myth-buster], [!culture-note], [!fun-fact] and other high-risk callout types
5-point verification: superlative claims, named individuals/works, statistics/dates, real-world examples, etymologies
Removed 'Score 9 if no errors found' free pass for core tracks
Fabricated claims in callout boxes are auto-fail regardless of track
Created scripts/extract_callout_claims.py — extracts 200 high-risk callout boxes from 68 modules for batch review
Output: curriculum/l2-uk-en/callout-claims-review.md (pending human/AI review)
Motivation: caught Gemini fabricating Ohiienko works, exaggerating Ostrozka Academy claims, fake metro announcements in core A1-B1 modules

name: enrich_research_quotes.py
observations: Location: scripts/enrich_research_quotes.py
Converts inline "..." quotes to «» guillemets in research files
Only converts quotes with 20+ Cyrillic chars inside 'Ключові факти та цитати' section and blockquote lines
No content changes — only quote mark characters
Fixes primary_quotes scoring gap in research_quality.py
Supports --dry-run (default), --apply, --tracks
Default tracks: hist, istorio, bio
Created 2026-02-21 to fix 26 modules from 8/10 to 9-10/10

name: enrich_research_gaps.py
observations: Location: scripts/enrich_research_gaps.py
Closes deterministic research quality gaps without LLM calls
Adds blockquote-formatted primary source quotes from existing «» text in the file
Adds skeleton section_notes and decolonization sections where missing
Reports remaining gaps that need Gemini enrichment (sources, chronology)
Supports --dry-run (default) and --apply
Created 2026-02-21 to fix 11 additional modules from 8/10 to 9/10

name: research_quality_scorer_fixes_2026-02-21
observations: Fixed _count_dated_entries() in scripts/research_quality.py
Bug 1: Missing year suffixes рік/роки/років in chronology pattern
Bug 2: Century references (IX ст., кін. XIII ст.) not matched at all
Bug 3: Full-line dedup bug — entries with same year but different text were deduplicated by set()
Fix: Match full lines (.*$), add century pattern ([IVXLC]+\s*ст.), use set union
Result: all 3 target tracks (hist, istorio, bio) reached 100% Exemplary

If it's hard, DO IT HARD — don't simplify without permission

gemini-2.5-pro-preview-05-06 was NOT available on this account as of 2026-02-22
Use ai_agent_bridge.py ask-gemini with --task-id issue-NNN

name: Phase D Function Extraction Plan
observations: Plan to refactor phase_D_v3() in scripts/build_module_v3.py from 460-line monolith into 4 sub-functions
_phase_D_pre_validate() — lines 2082-2154: pre-D validation + fix loop
_phase_D1_review() — lines 2157-2294: D.1 evidence review dispatch + quality gates
_phase_D2_repair_cycle() — lines 2341-2418: D.2 repair dispatch + apply fixes + diff-check
_phase_D3_rereview() — lines 2425-2491: D.3 re-review dispatch + quality gate
phase_D_v3() becomes ~80 line orchestrator calling the 4 sub-functions
Pure refactoring — no behavioral changes, no template changes
D.2 sub-phase split (grammar/content/activities) deferred — premature optimization without data on D.2 failure modes
Plan file saved at /Users/krisztiankoos/.claude/plans/generic-giggling-quill.md
Status: APPROVED but not yet implemented — waiting for weekly reset

name: Operation Cherepakha
observations: l2-uk-direct project codename: Операція Черепаха (Operation Turtle)
Mascot video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MImM8y_htqY
Philosophy: slow start, a bit scared, but aims high. Kiddie tone. Might fall but keeps going.
Scope: A1→B2, then graduate to l2-uk-en at C1+
Mascot video: "Черепаха Аха" (2022) by Ганна Чубач, channel Телекомпанія Малятко ТБ (289K subs, 25K likes)
Could be used as first listening material in the course — real Ukrainian from minute one
